# Compensall

> Compensall helps air passengers claim compensation of up to €600 per person under EU regulation EC 261/2004 for delayed, cancelled, and disrupted flights. Passengers upload a boarding pass, confirm flight details, sign legal documents, and track their claim online.

## Primary pages

- Home / claim start: https://compensall.vercel.app/
- Know your rights: https://compensall.vercel.app/know-your-rights
- Airlines and airports: https://compensall.vercel.app/airlines
- About: https://compensall.vercel.app/about
- Blog: https://compensall.vercel.app/blog

## Key guides

- Flight cancellation compensation: https://compensall.vercel.app/blog/flight-cancellation
- Flight delay compensation: https://compensall.vercel.app/blog/flight-delay
- Denied boarding rights: https://compensall.vercel.app/blog/denied-boarding

## Example airline pages

- Ryanair compensation: https://compensall.vercel.app/airlines/ryanair
- easyJet compensation: https://compensall.vercel.app/airlines/easyjet
- British Airways compensation: https://compensall.vercel.app/airlines/british-airways

## Legal documents

- No win, no fee agreement: https://compensall.vercel.app/documents/no-win-no-fee
- Authority to act: https://compensall.vercel.app/documents/authority-to-act
- Privacy and data consent: https://compensall.vercel.app/documents/privacy-data-consent

## Contact

Start a claim from the homepage boarding pass upload form. Human support is available throughout the process.
